nad.title: Power Supply Reliability Assessment — JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII
nad.h1: Power Supply Reliability Assessment for Enterprises
nad.label: Industrial Enterprises
nad.sub: Development of power supply reliability improvement measures and technical solutions for own generation construction.
nad.works.title: Scope of Works
nad.li1: Instrumental survey of the plant, analysis of power quality indicators
nad.li2: Modeling of external and internal power supply schemes of the enterprise
nad.li3: Assessment of existing power center loading considering production expansion and required reconstruction scope
nad.li4: Selection of equipment and optimal connection option for a new power center (feasibility study)
nad.li5: Assessment and correction of relay protection and automation device settings
nad.li6: Selection of optimal composition of new generating equipment considering power output requirements
nad.li7: Development of recommendations for UPS placement and configuration
nad.li8: Assessment of group self-start and motor start possibility
nad.li9: Assessment of permissible duration and depth of voltage dip at consumer busbars
nad.li10: Development of methods and selection of technical means for ensuring required power quality
nad.li11: Assessment of stable and reliable operation of VFD / SSD
nad.results.title: Results for the Client
nad.res1: Roadmap for prospective development of external and internal power supply of the enterprise (production expansion and modernization)
nad.res2: Economic justification for construction of own generation facility (reducing the cost of purchasing electricity and heat from the external grid)
nad.res3: Roadmap of power supply reliability improvement measures
nad.problems.title: Typical Problems We Solve
nad.prob1: Deep voltage dips during motor starts and self-starts
nad.prob2: High short-circuit current levels near consumers
nad.prob3: Violation of permissible power quality indicators
nad.prob4: Incorrect settings and uncoordinated RPA operation
nad.prob5: Insufficient reliability level and non-compliance with power supply category
nad.cta.title: Need a Reliability Assessment?
nad.cta.desc: Contact the area supervisor — Vitaliy Chumachenko, Deputy General Director for Power System Modeling.
